case_title: NGUYEN, JOHNNY et al vs. NHINGSAVATH, KHAMLA et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, JOHNNY TRUONG, IRENE AS TO DEFENDANT NHINGSAVATH, KHAMLA NHINGSAVATH, ERICA DOES 1 TO 40, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          OCT-17-1997 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-18-1997 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       SEP-29-1997

JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF OCT-17-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE TO PLT'S ATTY. OSC CALENDAR OF NOV-25-1997, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON NOV-25-1997, TO FILE POS AND OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. OSC AND SANCTION AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY STEVE MENDELSOHN, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE DEC-10-1997 CONTINUED FROM NOV-25-1997 TO JAN-21-1998 AT 02:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

PROOF OF SERVICE OSC CALENDAR OF SEP-23-1997, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT HEARING ON SEP-23-1997, SANCTION AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY STEVE MENDELSOHN., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE OCT-08-1997 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, JOHNNY TRUONG, IRENE
